_note: YouTube/TikTok thumbnail-ready portraits of you. High-click expressions, bold compositions, punchy colors — YOUR face stops the scroll. IP-Adapter FaceID preserves identity. Designed for 16:9 with text compositing zones. The existing yt_thumbnail recipes generate game characters; this one generates YOU.
template: YouTube thumbnail portrait of {subject}, {emotion} facial expression, {composition}, {palette} palette, {lighting}, ultra-detailed, crisp high contrast, punchy saturated colors, bold readable space for text, professional marketing quality
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, soft, low contrast, washed out, extra limbs, deformed face, wrong person, different person, generic, bland

composition: face filling the left third, large and close
extreme close-up with space on the right for text
centered power pose with clean background
lighting: dramatic rim light separating from background

rubric.identity: 1-5 — does this look like the same person as the reference?
